scripts.vendor:leaflet: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.join('node_modules','leaflet','dist');const dst='vendor/leaflet';if(!fs.existsSync(src))process.exit(1);fs.mkdirSync(p.join(dst,'images'),{recursive:true});['leaflet.css','leaflet.js'].forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f)));fs.readdirSync(p.join(src,'images')).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,'images',f),p.join(dst,'images',f)));console.log('Copied Leaflet to vendor/leaflet');"
